calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition To Terminate Proceedings For Lack Of Assets And Discharge Of Personal Representative
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

Mr. Cowan stated that he has had no contact whatsoever with his Client and that his Client is completely non-responsive. The Court stated that the request in the petition does not match what is in the order, that the proposed order should be with no omnibus clause in it and that the proper way to proceed would be to close the estate for lack of assets. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel, and the Petition for Termination of Further Proceedings, etc. (subject to review of the orders). The Court will modify the order on the petition for termination.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition Re: Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan, Esq. counsel for personal representative Anita Christopher - by telephone.

The Court notes that a Petition to Terminate the Estate due to lack of assets was taken off calendar earlier in the administration. Mr. Cowan notes the event that occasioned that procedure was the ostensible discovery of out-of-state real estate valued at approximately $60,000. Mr. Cowan advises the Court that his motion to be relieved as counsel is occasioned by the want of any response to his attempts to communicate with Ms. Christopher. As such, he is unable to determine whether an estate is necessary or not. After discussion, the consensus is that the out-of-state real estate could be attended to by way of ancillary probate proceeding and obviate the need for this proceeding. The Court instructs Mr. Cowan to return the Petition to Terminate to calendar and re-notice the same for hearing on July 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Cowan is to prepare and submit a proposed Order to that effect.

The Motion to be relieved as counsel is continued to July 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Jul-06-2020 Continued To Jul-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Cowan, Esq. counsel for personal representative Anita Christopher - by telephone.

Hearing held - See minutes this date.

The Motion to be relieved as counsel is continued to July 27, 2020 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition Re: Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-21-2020 Continued To Mar-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Petitioner.

The Court noted that there is a petition on calendar for March 16th to be relieved as Counsel. Mr. Cowan stated that the Client has not responded to any communications and that the Client is refusing to respond to e-mail, text or meet in person. The Court reminds Mr. Cowan that he may be required to do an accounting to close the estate. Mr. Cowan stated that the Decedent had property in Mississippi worth $50,000.00, that there are no California assets, that the three-year period will expire this month or next month in Mississippi and that Mississippi will then transfer title. Status on close of estate is continued to March 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition Re: Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Continued To Sep-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-31-2019 Continued To Aug-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Anita Smith.

Mr. Cowan requested a continuance stating that he was having trouble getting together with his Client, that the petition is drafted and ready to be signed, that his Client is out of the Country and that he hopes to get the petition signed soon. The Court informed Mr. Cowan that this needs to be a priority and that it is already overdue substantially. Status on close of estate is continued to August 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Cowan is to have his petition filed by August 21, 2019.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
